data.title: Versace Goes Prada: Capri's Big Exit Sparks Fashion Power Shift
data.description: Capri sells Versace to Prada for $1.4B as it refocuses on Kors and Choo amid tariff-driven market volatility.

data.title: PMGC Stock Surges After Subsidiary Inks Deal With Yuva Biosciences To Develop AI Led Therapies
data.description: PMGC Holdings is gaining in premarket trading after its subsidiary, Northstrive Biosciences, partnered with Yuva Biosciences to develop AI-powered therapies for cardiometabolic diseases. Yuva's MitoNova platform will identify compounds that support mitochondrial health.

data.title: Walmart's Strong Outlook Driven By 3 Strategic Advantages, Analyst Says
data.description: Walmart's investor day highlighted positive ecommerce growth, with a Buy rating and $106 price target from analyst Kate McShane.

data.title: Bitcoin Could Surge To $250,000, Says Cardano Co-Founder Charles Hoskinson

data.title: Oreo Maker Mondelez Commits $76 Million To Swiss Toblerone Factory
data.description: Mondelēz International (NASDAQ: MDLZ) is investing 65 million Swiss Francs to transform its Toblerone factory in Bern into a global hub for premium chocolate. The upgrade includes new production lines, facility modernization, and enhanced logistics to meet rising global demand.
